props.name: speed
props.description: Controls the animation speed of the silk effect.

props.name: scale
props.description: Controls the scale of the silk pattern.

props.name: color
props.description: Hex color code for the silk pattern.

props.name: noiseIntensity
props.description: Controls the intensity of the noise effect.

props.name: rotation
props.description: Controls the rotation of the silk pattern (in radians).
